label: hate
rationale: 'continue Kikuyu ethnic domination' attributes collective domination and power-grabbing to Kikuyus as a group.

label: neither
rationale: Reports what Gachagua said about treating Moses Kuria as outcast - describing political situation, not expressing hate.

label: hate
rationale: 'WAKIKUYU HAMTAKI WAJALUO WAPATE MAENDELEO' attributes collective malice (blocking Luo development) to Kikuyus as a group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'kasongo govt' and 'all kenyan polishtians killing Kenyans' - harsh political criticism with profanity, target is government not ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: 'I am Luhya full blooded' - identity statement and political promise to teach Kasongo a lesson, no group attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'ruto is a goon and wantam' - personal insult of individual politician, not ethnic.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus receiving all Kenyan goodies' while 'Lakers are used as burukenges... idiots' - attributes collective benefit to Kikuyus and calls Luos idiots being manipulated.

label: hate
rationale: 'a luo is happy as long as a Kikuyu is not president' - attributes collective immutable mentality to Luos as a group.

label: neither
rationale: Describes historical peoples from Arabian peninsula, not Kenyan political context; unintelligible application.

label: offensive
rationale: 'cursed man' directed at individual politician Kindiki for his role overseeing protests, not ethnic targeting.

label: hate
rationale: 'Waluyha bora washibe tu' - Luhyas are easily satisfied/bought with little, attributing gullibility collectively.

label: neither
rationale: 'Selfish Kenyatta family' - attacks specific political family, not Kikuyus as group; speaker identifies as Kikuyu.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Waluke... cowards... ready to deal with your goons' - personal attack on individual politician with threat to his supporters.

label: hate
rationale: 'most likely popular community vulnerable to be used and dumbed is Luhya. Bora unga' - attributes collective gullibility and manipulation to Luhyas.

label: neither
rationale: 'The Kikuyus will benefit the most because after 2027, Ruto doesn't need Luos' - electoral arithmetic predicting benefit distribution, no contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Questions about political faction plans (tutam vs wantam), no group attack.

label: hate
rationale: 'DONT impose Kikuyu tyranny on Kenya... shareholder mind set' - attributes collective tyranny and domination to Kikuyus as a group.

label: neither
rationale: 'how gullible are Kenyans' - general statement about all Kenyans, no ethnic targeting.

label: neither
rationale: Discusses which groups receive government benefits and electoral predictions - political analysis without contempt.

label: offensive
rationale: 'those tukunias' with call to arrest - harsh political rhetoric calling for accountability, unclear if ethnic slur.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Kasongo walai tena' - profane political criticism, no clear ethnic targeting.

label: hate
rationale: 'wewe ni na kasongo ni kabila moja mafi sana' - 'one tribe very dirty/trash', calling an entire tribe filth.

label: neither
rationale: 'Mt Kenya oligarchs to protect their interests... Kikuyus have realised the con' - criticizes political class, describes Kikuyu voters realizing something, no collective contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'follow them like blind goats' - dehumanizing comparison of Luhyas to blind goats who cannot make own decisions.

label: hate
rationale: 'powerful than the kisii sorcery' - invokes ethnic stereotype about Kisii people and witchcraft to describe political opponents.
